$comment: Static host capability matrix for agent-get. Defines supported hosts, their asset paths, and documentation references.

mcp.description: Inject into mcpServers.<name> in .cursor/mcp.json. The MCP source JSON file is the value object for mcpServers[name].

skill.description: Copy the skill directory to .cursor/skills/<name>/. Entry point is SKILL.md.

prompt.description: Append content to AGENTS.md in the project root, wrapped in HTML comment markers for idempotency.

command.description: Copy the command markdown file to .cursor/commands/<name>.md. Filename becomes the slash command name.

subAgent.description: Copy the sub-agent markdown file to .cursor/agents/<name>.md. Apply agent-get/cursor/* hints and strip agent-get/* fields.

mcp.description: Inject into mcpServers.<name> in .mcp.json at project root. The MCP source JSON file is the value object for mcpServers[name].

skill.description: Copy the skill directory to .claude/skills/<name>/. Entry point is SKILL.md. Note: .claude/commands/<name>.md is equivalent but skills are preferred.

prompt.description: Append content to CLAUDE.md in the project root, wrapped in HTML comment markers for idempotency.

command.description: Copy the command markdown file to .claude/commands/<name>.md. Filename becomes the slash command name.

subAgent.description: Copy the sub-agent markdown file to .claude/agents/<name>.md. Apply agent-get/claude-code/* hints and strip agent-get/* fields.

mcp.description: Inject into mcpServers.<name> in claude_desktop_config.json. Requires Claude Desktop restart to take effect.

skill.reason: Claude Desktop is a UI-based chat application and does not support project-level skill files.

prompt.reason: Claude Desktop is a UI-based chat application and does not support project-level rules or memory files.

command.reason: Claude Desktop is a UI-based chat application and does not support custom slash commands.

subAgent.reason: Claude Desktop is a UI-based chat application and does not support sub-agent configuration files.
